author: y4rr
content: F2+F3 complete. Generated GGUF v3 fixture (386 bytes, 2 metadata KVs, 3 tensors: F32 + Q8_0). Replaced gguf_items_cascade_skip and onnx_export_items_cascade_skip with 17 live conformance tests (12 GGUF + 5 ONNX). All 53 conformance_serialize tests pass. Clippy clean. Issues #848 and #849 closed. Commit 2cdc4e23 on main.
